questions: Is the patient's Fungal Keratitis severe? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have poor compliance? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have a deep stromal infection? (Yes/No)
Is the treatment duration less than 3-4 days? (Yes/No)
Is the active stage of infection persisting? (Yes/No)
Does the patient fail to respond to medical treatment? (Yes/No)
Is there a risk of corneal perforation? (Yes/No)
What specific antifungal drug is being used?
Does the patient have any allergies to antifungal medications? (Yes/No)
